auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

deny.title: Access Denied
deny.accountInactive: Your account has been suspended or disabled. Please contact an administrator.
deny.noAccess: You do not have access to any customer workspace. Please request an invitation from a manager.
deny.genericError: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
deny.adminMfaRequired: Multi-factor authentication is required for System Admin access. Please configure TOTP or WebAuthn.
deny.adminAuthTooOld: Your authentication has expired. System Admin sign-in must be completed within 5 minutes.
deny.adminRoleMissing: You do not have the System Admin role. Contact an administrator to request access.
deny.adminNotEligible: Your account is not eligible for System Admin access.
deny.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new invitation.
deny.invitationEmailMismatch: The email address you signed in with does not match the invited email. Please sign in with the correct account.
deny.invitationEmailNotVerified: Your email address has not been verified. Please verify your email before accepting the invitation.
deny.contactAdmin: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage members and invitations for your organization.
members.name: Name
members.lastManagerTooltip: This member is the only Manager. Their role cannot be changed and they cannot be removed.
members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? This action cannot be undone.
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new member.
members.inviteAlreadyMember: This email is already a member of the organization.
members.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}?
members.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
members.lastManagerError: Cannot remove or demote the last Manager.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
